Data Scientist

DataVerse Analytics

New York, NY (Remote)

About DataVerse Analytics

DataVerse Analytics is a Series B startup building the next generation of marketing analytics tools. Our platform helps e-commerce companies understand customer behavior through advanced statistical modeling and machine learning. We are a remote-first company with team members across the US.

The Role

We are hiring a Data Scientist to join our Core Models team. You will work on building and improving the ML models that drive our product recommendations engine and customer segmentation features. You will collaborate closely with engineering and product to ship models into production.

What You Will Do

  • Build and deploy machine learning models for customer segmentation and churn prediction
  • Design and analyze A/B tests to measure the impact of model changes on business metrics
  • Write production-quality Python code for data pipelines and model training
  • Use SQL to extract and analyze large datasets from our data warehouse
  • Create dashboards and reports to communicate findings to stakeholders
  • Collaborate with ML engineers to deploy models using TensorFlow Serving

What We Are Looking For

  • 3+ years of experience in a data science or machine learning role
  • Strong programming skills in Python, including Pandas and Scikit-learn
  • Experience building and training models with TensorFlow or PyTorch
  • Solid foundation in statistics, hypothesis testing, and A/B testing methodology
  • Proficiency in SQL for data extraction and analysis
  • Experience with machine learning experiment tracking and model versioning
  • Strong communication skills and ability to present technical results to non-technical audiences

Compensation

Base salary: $140,000 - $180,000 depending on experience. Equity, full benefits, and a $2,000 annual home office stipend included.

Submit Application
